chunks.text:
Blackwell Fencing — Fencing company in Wylie. Services:
- Wood fence installation
- Iron fencing
- Chain link fencing
- Fence repair
- Custom gates

Contact Information:

- Email: megan@blackwellfencing. com
- Address: 3915 Troy Rd, Wylie, TX 75098
- Website: https://www. blackwellfencing. com/
- Service Area: Wylie, TX and surrounding areas

Rating: 4. 8 stars with 9 reviews.
